episodes.title: Highlights from Bill and Hillary Clinton speaking about their knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein's crimes
episodes.description:
The House Oversight Committee released the full deposition of former President Bill Clinton and his wife, former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton, centered on the committee’s investigation into the Epstein files. The Clintons  separately testified before the committee in closed-door meetings last week, with both facing more than four hours of questioning.

Jeffrey Epstein was found guilty of sex trafficking minors in 2019 and died in prison that same year. Ghislaine Maxwell, Epstein's associate, is currently serving time in prison. She was moved to a prison in Texas from Florida. Maxwell is currently serving a 20-year prison sentence after being convicted on child sex trafficking charges.
Full story: https://fox11online.com/news/nation-world/oversight-committee-posts-full-clinton-depositions-on-epstein-files-after-talks
